title: The Solitaire Man
writer: James Kevin McGuinness, Bella Spewack, Sam Spewack
actors: Herbert Marshall, Mary Boland, Lionel Atwill
plot: Oliver Lane is "The Solitaire Man," a renowned jewel thief who is ready to retire and marry Helen, his partner in crime and his one true love. Their plans are shattered when another member of their gang, Bascom, walks in with a st...
